details.test: Task 1: Start 8000 fixed-rate application to employment step
Task 2: Compare two offers and save lower total repayment as favorite
Task 3: Eligibility checker 60-month home improvement under 300 and start pre-approval
Task 4: Reduce draft loan amount until payment < 250 and save draft
Task 5: Update payment schedule to early due date, enable autopay and 3-day email reminders
Task 6: Home improvement loan (no fees, <=36 months) to review step
Task 7: Loan calculator find 200-220 payment and save scenario
Task 8: Update profile contact info and communication preferences
Task 9: Add co-applicant and select highest loan amount offer under 15% APR
